_comment: Scoped to security-adjacent surfaces: audit hash chain (vault Build/Audit Hash Chain — tamper evidence), TF egress + idempotency cache (host pin + replay safety), HITL refusal policy (--danger-apply gate), CLI flag mutex (--dry-plan/--execute exclusion), prompt assembler (path-ownership refusal + budget), env validator (boot-time refusals). Threshold ≥ 80% per tasks.md task 15. Excludes CLI entrypoints (verify.ts), data-shaping helpers (toonContext), and stub-heavy lanes (mastra agents, workflows).
_mutator_comment: Disable StringLiteral globally — most survivors are error-message text inside `throw new Error(...)`. Exact-text assertions in tests are brittle without raising security signal. ConditionalExpression / LogicalOperator / EqualityOperator / MethodExpression survivors stay enabled (real refusal-path test gaps).
